meta.name: Gold Rush Town — Parts Catalog
meta.note: SimCity/Sims-style modular parts kit. One part = one declarative file (AI-editable). Owner-gated (Mission Control), decoupled from the live town. Same parts feed the town and LP/website. Generated by generate-parts.mjs from gen/catalog-def.mjs + gen/builders.mjs.
meta.art_language: palette.js (Wild-21 + SaSame gold) — fine-voxel, single coherent kit
